languages.text: "Несомненно. Это такая же часть моего пути Поиска знания, как и сотворение Триасоматы, но в текущем эксперименте я избрал иной подход".
"Naturally. This is part of my path on the Quest for Knowledge, just as the creation of Triasomata was, but I have taken a different approach in my current experiment."
languages.original_text: "Несомненно. Это такая же часть моего пути Поиска знания, как и сотворение Триасоматы, но в текущем эксперименте я избрал иной подход".

traits.locale_text: "Naturally. This is part of my path on the Quest for Knowledge, just as the creation of Triasomata was, but I have taken a different approach in my current experiment."
"Naturally. This is part of my path on the Quest for Knowledge, just as the creation of Triasomata was, but I have taken a different approach in my current experiment."
"Naturally. This is part of my path on the Quest for Knowledge, just as the creation of Triasomata was, but I have taken a different approach in my current experiment."

languages.text: "Natürlich. Das ist Teil meines Weges auf der Suche nach Wissen, genau wie die Schaffung eines Triasomata, aber mit meinem aktuellen Experiment verfolge ich einen anderen Ansatz."
languages.original_text: "Naturally. This is part of my path on the Quest for Knowledge, just as the creation of Triasomata was, but I have taken a different approach in my current experiment."

traits.locale_text: "Natürlich. Das ist Teil meines Weges auf der Suche nach Wissen, genau wie die Schaffung eines Triasomata, aber mit meinem aktuellen Experiment verfolge ich einen anderen Ansatz."

languages.text: « Bien entendu. Cela fait partie de mon cheminement dans la Quête de la Connaissance, tout comme l'était la création d'un Triasomata. Mais j'ai choisi une approche différente pour cette expérience. »
languages.original_text: "Naturally. This is part of my path on the Quest for Knowledge, just as the creation of Triasomata was, but I have taken a different approach in my current experiment."

traits.locale_text: « Bien entendu. Cela fait partie de mon cheminement dans la Quête de la Connaissance, tout comme l'était la création d'un Triasomata. Mais j'ai choisi une approche différente pour cette expérience. »

languages.text: “当然。这正是我求知远征的一部分，正如我进行的三相体实验一样，只不过这次我采取了不同的方法。”
languages.original_text: "Naturally. This is part of my path on the Quest for Knowledge, just as the creation of Triasomata was, but I have taken a different approach in my current experiment."

traits.locale_text: “当然。这正是我求知远征的一部分，正如我进行的三相体实验一样，只不过这次我采取了不同的方法。”

languages.text: «Naturalmente. Esto es parte de la búsqueda del conocimiento para mí, al igual que la creación del triasómata. Es solo que he empleado un enfoque nuevo en este experimento».
languages.original_text: "Naturally. This is part of my path on the Quest for Knowledge, just as the creation of Triasomata was, but I have taken a different approach in my current experiment."

traits.locale_text: «Naturalmente. Esto es parte de la búsqueda del conocimiento para mí, al igual que la creación del triasómata. Es solo que he empleado un enfoque nuevo en este experimento».

languages.text: 「間違いなく。それはトリアソマタの創造と同様に私の知識の探求の道の一部であるが、今回の実験では異なるアプローチを選択した」
languages.original_text: "Naturally. This is part of my path on the Quest for Knowledge, just as the creation of Triasomata was, but I have taken a different approach in my current experiment."

traits.locale_text: 「間違いなく。それはトリアソマタの創造と同様に私の知識の探求の道の一部であるが、今回の実験では異なるアプローチを選択した」

languages.text: "Hâliyle. Tıpkı Üçyeköz'ün yaratılması gibi bu da İrfan Arayışı'ndaki yolumun bir parçası. Ancak mevcut deneyimde farklı bir yaklaşım benimsedim."
languages.original_text: "Naturally. This is part of my path on the Quest for Knowledge, just as the creation of Triasomata was, but I have taken a different approach in my current experiment."

traits.locale_text: "Hâliyle. Tıpkı Üçyeköz'ün yaratılması gibi bu da İrfan Arayışı'ndaki yolumun bir parçası. Ancak mevcut deneyimde farklı bir yaklaşım benimsedim."
